title: Early-level authored route

public_sources.name: Pac-Man Dossier
public_sources.notes: Used for public ghost AI, scatter/chase, dot-stall, frightened, and speed-table behavior references; this route is an authored deterministic validation vector, not extracted from restricted program ROMs.

intent: Exercise a longer level-1 route with repeated turns, pellet scoring, mode timing, and ghost checkpoint state while recording measured timing drift against the Dossier-derived speed-table contract.
